case_title: DUBOIS LUCILLE VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY DUBOIS LUCILLE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUBOIS LUCILLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $334.55 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $334.55, JUDGMENT STIPULATED TO BY BOTH SIDES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
